title: issue while converting verilog of serial adder into aiger

features.name: async_reset_dff_with_output_reg
features.description: Code should include an always block with clock and asynchronous reset sensitivity list using blocking assignments to output reg signals, which causes Yosys to create $_DFFSR_PPP_ cells that aigmap cannot handle

features.name: blocking_carry_chain_in_sequential_block
features.description: Code should include a sequential always block where a carry variable is computed via blocking assignment chain and conditionally initialized on first iteration, producing state feedback that generates unsupported DFFSR cells
